## AI Video Creator v1.0.0

First public release of the standalone **Video Prompt Studio** by DJ M@D (Bones Vibration).

### Director Engine

- Native **Create / Render / Advanced** UI with style profiles, Inspire me, wizard, and 7 scene templates
- Visual craft controls — shot type, camera, lens, film format, color grade, lighting
- Export long-form prompts and Director job JSON for any video AI (Sora, Runway, Kling, etc.)
- Optional local GPU render pipeline

### Music video paths (A–E)

| Path | Input |
|------|--------|
| **A** | Analyzed track → video fields |
| **B** | Suno Style + Lyrics paste |
| **C** | Track + paste merged |
| **D** | Manuscript chat brief |
| **E** | Track + reference image — beat sync, lip-sync scaffold, duration sync, auto i2v |

**Path E highlights:**

- BPM beat grid and timestamped shot structure
- Lip-sync rules when vocals are likely (prompt-level)
- Full track capped at **480s**, or **highlight section** only
- Scrolls to Director after apply

### Desktop app

- Windows NSIS installer
- **Auto-update** from GitHub Releases (`latest.yml`)
- Header controls: Check for updates / Restart to install
- First-launch user guide PDF

### Install

Download **AI-Video-Creator-Setup-1.0.0.exe** below and run the installer.
